professional.paragraph1: Gloseria offers advanced technology actives developed according to the biological needs of the skin.
professional.paragraph2: Each product is designed with professional protocols that can be integrated into clinical applications.

about.headline: Gloseria offers professional products developed for the needs of dermatologists and aesthetic medicine physicians.

items.title: Molecular Precision
items.description: Our products are developed through advanced biotechnological processes that ensure active components reach target tissue with maximum stability. Each vial is a concentrated engineering marvel that optimizes clinical results.

items.title: Synergistic Protocols
items.description: Gloseria products are not just individual solutions but intelligent systems that can be combined with each other. From spot treatment to bio-stimulation, we offer a flexible range of applications that can be integrated into your clinical protocols.

items.title: Biocompatible and Safe
items.description: We prioritize safety, the most sensitive criterion of dermatologists. The Gloseria series consists of professional contents that are fully compatible with skin tissue, minimize inflammation risk, and maintain the highest sterilization standards.

items.title: Evidence-Based Aesthetics
items.description: We believe in clinical data, not marketing promises. Gloseria follows the most current literature in aesthetic medicine, delivering "predictable" results that meet physicians' expectations.

workshop.title: Workshop
workshop.intro: Gloseria organizes special, practical and limited participation workshops for dermatologists and aesthetic medicine physicians in different cities.
workshop.paragraph1: In these exclusive meetings, the scientific foundations of advanced formulations, clinical protocols and high-success application techniques are transferred one-on-one. Through live applications and case sharing, theoretical knowledge is transformed into top-level clinical experience.
workshop.paragraph2: Gloseria workshops are designed to deepen professionals' knowledge and elevate clinical standards to the next level.

national.title: 8th International Aesthetic Medicine Congress
national.description: Gloseria participated in the 8th International Aesthetic Medicine Congress, one of the most prestigious organizations in the field, presenting its innovative product portfolio and scientific approach to industry professionals.

international.title: 8th International Medical Aesthetic Congress
international.description: Gloseria participated in the 8th International Medical Aesthetic Congress, one of the most prestigious organizations in the field, presenting its innovative product portfolio and scientific approach to industry professionals.

corporatePage.heading: An Approach Shaped by Science
corporatePage.intro: Gloseria is a brand that develops products for professional use in dermatology and aesthetic medicine. Our products are designed with a scientific formulation approach that puts the skin's biological structure at the center. Our goal is to develop solutions that physicians can safely use in their clinical applications, provide high efficacy and deliver sustainable results.
corporatePage.missionText: To develop solutions for dermatologists and aesthetic medicine physicians based on scientific foundations, with high clinical accuracy and supporting patient satisfaction.
corporatePage.visionText: To be a reference brand in the field, nationally and internationally, with its innovative approach, prestigious brand position and clinical success-focused products.
corporatePage.splitParagraph: Gloseria is a brand that does not limit quality only to formulation in the dermo-cosmetic field; it embraces high standards in all stages from production processes to clinical feedback. Our product development approach aims to meet efficacy, safety and professional use requirements at the same point.

values.title: Scientific Credibility
values.text: All our products are developed in line with current scientific data and clinical feedback.

values.title: Professional Focus
values.text: Gloseria provides only solutions suitable for professional use requirements.

values.title: High Efficacy
values.text: Our formulations are designed to provide maximum clinical performance with targeted active ingredients.

values.title: Continuous Improvement
values.text: Our product portfolio is continuously updated in line with innovations in dermatology and aesthetic medicine.

values.title: Education and Sharing
values.text: We support knowledge sharing and professional development through practical workshops and clinical meetings.

corporatePage.closingParagraph: This holistic perspective makes Gloseria a sustainable and reliable solution partner in clinical applications.

workshop.title: Part of Professional Experience
workshop.text: Gloseria brings together clinical knowledge and experience through practical workshops held in different cities. These organizations are designed to increase physicians' application competence and raise clinical standards.

corporatePage.futureLead: Gloseria continues to provide solutions powered by science by bringing together quality, trust and prestige in the field of medical aesthetics.

productPage.notFoundText: This product page may not be available yet.

contactPage.heading: Get in touch
contactPage.lede: For corporate inquiries and questions about our products, fill out the form and we’ll get back to you shortly.

form.title: Send a message
form.sub: Leave your details. For now, the form only validates and shows an on-page notice (no backend submission).
form.successText: Thank you. We’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters.
